authLayout.desc: Sign in to manage your data and use the system's features securely.

login.title: Sign in
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

register.title: Create account
register.name: Name
register.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
register.success: Account created. We've sent an email to activate your account.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.desc: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a recovery code.

forgot.title: Forgot my password
forgot.sentDesc: If the email exists, we've sent a link to reset your password.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.success: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
reset.invalidDesc: The reset link is incomplete or has expired. Request a new one.

activate.successDesc: Your account has been activated. You can now sign in.
activate.errorDesc: The link may have expired or already been used.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.unavailableDesc: The backend does not expose user data yet. Showing the identifier used at login: {{label}}.

password.title: Change password
password.hint: At least 8 characters, with one uppercase letter, one number and one special character.

settings.title: Preferences
settings.themeDesc: Choose light, dark or follow the system. The preference is saved to your account.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the interface language. The preference is saved to your account.

security.title: Two-factor authentication (MFA)
security.lowCodes: Few recovery codes left. Consider regenerating them.
security.startDesc: You'll need an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
security.scanDesc: Scan the QR Code in your authenticator, or enter the key manually, then provide the generated code.
security.recoveryTitle: Keep these codes in a safe place
security.recoveryDesc: Each code can be used once to sign in if you lose your authenticator. They won't be shown again.

home.welcome: Welcome to Pandora. Use the sidebar to navigate and your user menu, in the top right corner, to manage your account and security.
